title: Sales Account Manager
description:
About Us:

One World Technology Rental is a leading provider of IT and technology equipment for Business and Corporate Events. One World Rental's extensive range includes Computers, Tablets, AV, Wi-Fi, and Staffing solutions. With 9 international offices, we are a thriving company with big ambitions, serving major international organizations such as Disney, EY, Tom Ford, BBC, CitiBank, and GSK.

Job Description:

As a Sales Account Manager, you will play a crucial role in achieving ambitious sales targets through developing and strengthening our existing and potential client base. This role offers an exciting opportunity for dynamic sales professionals with B2B experience to join our innovative and friendly team.

This role is best suited to an Experienced Account Manager with a Hunter mindset who is willing to chase down leads and onboard new prospective business instead of a farmer role.

We welcome interest in the role from applicants with industry experience in either event tech rentals, software sales or the Events industry.

Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain relationships with key clients to ensure their satisfaction and loyalty.
Identify new business opportunities and generate leads through proactive prospecting and networking.
Collaborate with internal teams to create customised solutions that meet client needs.
Manage the entire sales process, from initial contact to closing the deal.
Meet or exceed sales targets and goals on a consistent basis.
Provide regular reports and updates on sales activities and performance.
Process inbound leads and inquiries, converting them into sales and orders.
Conduct gap analysis to identify opportunities for account improvement.
Research prospective clients through various resources, including trade press, local media, websites, and internal databases.
Develop relationships with existing clients, ensuring increased customer spend.
Update and input records on CRM systems, adhering to SOPs and producing accurate pipeline and sales reports.
Demonstrate a positive and fearless attitude, with strong communication skills over the telephone.
Work collaboratively as a team member and independently, showcasing strong IT skills.
Understand IT products and stay updated on industry trends.
Be self-motivated, target-driven, and eager to contribute to the company's growth.

Requirements:

Proven experience in sales, preferably as an Account Manager or Business Development Manager
Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate and inspire a team.
Excellent analytical skills to identify market trends and opportunities.
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills to build rapport with clients and colleagues.
Proficiency in Salesforce or similar CRM software for managing customer relationships.
Experience in IT/Technology sales.
Events Industry experience (preferred but not essential).
Excellent telephone skills.

Benefits:
Uncapped Commission on every sale
Regular increases in base pay
Staff Day’s / Night’s Out, Team Lunches
Company Snack Cupboard and treats
Achievable KPI’s
Room for in house progression and development
Hardware and Software training days

Salary:

High uncapped commission on every sale with a basic salary of $4200 - $4500 per month based on experience.

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent

Working hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm at our Singapore Office.

How to Apply:

If you have the required skills and experience, please apply now!

We regret to inform that only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

postedCompany.name: ONE WORLD IT RENTAL ASIA PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
